commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a /git/:owner/:repo.git smart-HTTP proxy, caller Git policy storage/admin APIs, CLI clone/credential-helper commands, a D1 migration, generated SQL, and Worker/CLI tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. to the feature request itself; the merge blockers are source-reproducible from the diff. The new /git route bypasses the audited relay path, and receive-pack identity selection filters only on GitHub App kind.
